production_quality_gates: digitize official 2025 KDRIs tables from permitted source artifacts
record official source artifact name, page/table number, reviewer, and review date for every nutrient row
apply all official errata before enabling production use

complete license and redistribution review before committing official derived datasets
run backend/scripts/validate_kdris_dataset.py --require-approved and store the passing checksum in dataset_artifacts
